@startuml
participant "C" as Actor
participant "C" as SingleObject

Actor <<Actor>>
SingleObject <<Interface>>

Actor "SinglePatternDemo"
SingleObject "SingleObject"

Actor "SinglePatternDemo" -> SingleObject : asks
SingleObject -> SingleObject : returns

SingleObject -Instance : SingleObject
SingleObject -SingleObject()
SingleObject +getInstance() : SingleObject
SingleObject +showMessage() : void

@enduml
